ARTORIACASTER-AROUND_CALIBURN.descriptio: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Remove all your debuffs. Gain !AntiPurge! *Anti/-Purge, /+!PerTwenty! per 20 Charge beyond the minimum /(max 5). Gain !Strength! *Strength and !B! Block. In multiplayer: allies remove their debuffs and gain 1 *Strength.
